WORKSHEET #10 - Beginning Your Personal Story
Start with the opposite or an approximation of the opposite of the end of your
story.
Start your story with location and action.
Avoid loading the beginning with adjectives. Instead, use good, hard nouns.
Avoid exposition. Do not teach your audience about things in the story until
you’ve started the story.
Start as close to the end as possible
Take the personal story that you have previously chosen and craft a strong
beginning by using as many of the strategies as possible.
